entries.definition: a feeling of curiosity or concern about something; the quality that attracts attention; money paid regularly at a particular rate for the use of money lent, or for delaying the repayment of a debt
entries.exampleSentence: She has a strong interest in art and history.

entries.definition: to attract or hold the attention or curiosity of someone
entries.exampleSentence: The story will interest anyone who enjoys mysteries.
